title: Resolution Adopting the Administrative Order No. 42, Dated June 1, 2021 of the Office of the President, ? Authorizing the Continued Grant of the Covid-19 Special Risk Allowance to Public and Private Health Workers Directly Catering to or in Contact with Covid-19 Patients During the State of National Emergency.? (AUTHOR(S): Hon. Miko C. Pelegrina, Hon. Janos S. Lapiz, Hon. Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Hon. Mike Dexter A. Concio, Hon. Mark Lester B. Dizon, Hon. Rodora P. Loares, Hon. Jozylyn N. Manansala,
